output.summary: Remove the HTML tag hints '(H2)' and '(H3)' from the heading size toggle labels in the editor sidebar. This is a cosmetic TSX-only change affecting two string literals.

fileChanges.description: Update heading size toggle option labels to remove HTML tag references
fileChanges.details: Line 302: Change 'Regular (H2)' to 'Regular'. Line 305: Change 'Small (H3)' to 'Small'. These are the ToggleGroupControlOption label props inside the 'Heading Size' ToggleGroupControl.

designDecisions.decision: Remove HTML tag hints from heading size labels
designDecisions.evidence: User explicitly requested removing (H2) and (H3) from the heading size field labels
